creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 180504
seafile-gui.diff

This is an update to seafile-gui to the most current version, 6.0.4.


* Updated to 6.0.4

 - Fixed a bug in shibboleth login.
 - Fixed the online help url.
 - Clear previous text when new sharing is created.
 - Updated i18n.

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports/devel/libevent found, even though it is listed in LIB_DEPENDS.
0 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.
